title: Data Driven Locator Bar Hiding
description: Makes the items that allow players to hide from the locator bar data driven instead of hard-coded.
body:
This mod makes a minor change to the Player Locator Bar so that entities can be hidden by items in the `#wich:locator_bar_hidden` tag [default values: carved pumpkin and all player/mob head items] instead of a hard-coded set of items.

The [Show Carved Pumpkins](https://modrinth.com/project/data-driven-locator-bar-hiding-show-carved-pumpkins) data pack removes carved pumpkins from this tag which can put players back on the locator bar on servers that use the carved pumpkin for custom hats.
